backend_routes.note: Single ServeHTTP entry with 3 regex routes + POST /_/worker/trigger; no routes/ or handlers/ directory

services.note: Internal packages act as service-layer modules. Grew from 4 (init) to 5 with the new accesslog package.

data_models.note: types.ImageOptions + interface contracts; accesslog.Entry and nested structs. No persistence models.

auth_files.note: No auth at proxy layer; relies on Cloudflare + LB. POST /_/worker/trigger is unauthenticated (gap #5 in architecture.md §9; risk made more concrete by PR #4).

background_jobs.note: Bulk pre-resize triggered via POST /_/worker/trigger; no queue, no scheduler. After PR #4 the payload is a multi-image / multi-format envelope.

persistence.note: S3-compatible only — no relational DB, no ORM. Split between origin and cache buckets when CACHE_MODE != off.

test_infra.note: 9 test files (up from 5 at init); server_test.go alone is 1584 LOC.

config_files.note: Application config remains env-var only (no app config file); 22 env vars (up from 14 at init).

observability.note: NEW signal since init. Structured JSON access logs (stdout) + Server-Timing response header + per-phase timings via PRs #1 and #3.
